title: fagelia serrata
intro: Fagelia serrata, also known as South African pelargonium, is a type of flowering plant native to South Africa, belonging to the family Geraniaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Fagelia serrata include relieving symptoms of colds and flu, soothing sore throats, and reducing fever. Fagelia serrata can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is often used in herbal remedies to support immune function and overall well-being.
